rejected_candidates.title: Direct underlying donations can arbitrarily inflate the exchange rate
rejected_candidates.reason: Supported by the code, but not independently reportable here: direct donation mainly becomes harmful through the separate zero-mint and zero-burn rounding bugs. On its own it is an enabling condition rather than a distinct exploit in this codebase.

rejected_candidates.title: Balance-delta accounting makes the market unsafe for rebasing or flash-mintable underlyings
rejected_candidates.reason: Too speculative for a reportable issue from this code alone. The claim depends on listing an exotic or malicious underlying with non-standard balance semantics, and no asset-specific evidence or concrete exploit path is present in this market snapshot.
